name: Apple Walnut Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill Preparation Time: 1:05
1. Cream the margarine and sugar in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Add the beaten eggs and vanilla extract, then whisk to combine well.
3. Gradually mix in baking soda, salt, flour, and cinnamon with the egg mixture until fully incorporated.
4. Gently fold in the thinly sliced apples and chopped walnuts into the batter, just enough to distribute them evenly throughout.
5. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan with butter or cooking spray and sprinkle with flour.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
